# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
appVersion: "1.0"
description: A Helm chart for Kubernetes with an Ingress resource configuration and the ability of accepting traffic from any hostname in different environments (dev, staging, prod) allowing flexibility 
    when moving to production using TLS certificates at that time  
name: myapp-chart
type: application/vnd.kubernetes.helm.config+yaml
version: "0.1"
